mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM actor WHERE status = 0
AND role_name = #{style}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO actor ( name, avatar, intro, role_name, style, works_count, view_count, like_count, join_date, status ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{avatar}, #{intro}, #{roleName}, #{style}, #{worksCount}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{joinDate}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE actor SET name = #{name}, avatar = #{avatar}, intro = #{intro}, role_name = #{roleName}, style = #{style}, works_count = #{worksCount}, view_count = #{viewCount}, like_count = #{likeCount}, join_date = #{joinDate}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE actor SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND like_count > 0
